fixesApplied.description: Tab button height: changed h-[140px] (conditional on inactive) to min-h-[140px] (always on all tabs). Updated PHP, TSX, and JS. JS no longer toggles height class.

Mobile accordion icon vertical centering: Added mt-[9px] to the icon wrapper div so the +/- icon aligns to the center of the first line of the 32px heading text. Summary keeps items-start for multi-line wrapping.

Added hover effects: Desktop tab buttons get hover:bg-accent/20 (inactive) and hover:!bg-accent (active). Mobile accordion summaries get hover:bg-accent/20 transition-colors. Changed transition-colors to transition-all on desktop buttons for smooth animations.

Restored tab title editing in TabsItem.tsx: The desktop-only title heading in the content area now uses AdvancedRichText instead of plain text, so the title is always editable regardless of whether the summary (mobile-only) is visible.

Inline editing of title and description in parent Tabs.tsx tablist: When a tab is active, the tablist button renders AdvancedRichText for both title and description. Edits update child block attributes via useDispatch/updateBlockAttributes. Inactive tabs show plain text spans.

Content area full height: The panels wrapper in TSX now uses 'relative flex-1 flex flex-col' and the innerBlocksProps className includes md:h-full so the content panel stretches to match the tablist height.

Description reveal animation: In PHP, the description span uses overflow-hidden transition-all duration-300 with max-h-20/opacity-100 (active) or max-h-0/opacity-0 (inactive) instead of the hidden class. JS now toggles max-h and opacity classes for smooth fade/slide animation.

warnings: Pre-existing CSS token warnings for gap utility
Pre-existing bundle size warnings for editor.js and screen entrypoints

syncStatus.details: PHP and TSX sync verified for: TabsItem summary classes (p-6, items-start, hover), icon dimensions (w-5 h-5 mt-[9px]), desktop title heading classes, tab button base classes (min-h-[140px], hover:bg-accent/20), active tab classes (bg-accent selected hover:!bg-accent). TSX editor-only enhancements (AdvancedRichText, useDispatch/updateBlockAttributes) do not affect frontend sync.
